title: Search
content_html:
Search

This section describes the search planning and implementation.

Search is currently available on the public site for the catalogue scope.

Documents

  • Overview - a concise overview of the site search subsystem.
  • Public UI Contract - defines the public /search/ route, scope/q URL contract, and scope-led entry-point model.
  • Index Schema - describes the current catalogue search index shape.
  • Field Registry - separates “field exists in schema” from “field participates in search and how.”
  • Ranking Model - explain current relevance behaviour separately from schema and field policy.
  • UI Behaviour - separates browser behaviour from ranking and indexing
  • Build Pipeline - explains how source content becomes the generated index.
  • Normalisation Rules - describes token preparation, deduplication, hyphen/space handling, and similar preprocessing rules.
  • Validation Checklist - should be short and operational rather than explanatory
  • Config Architecture - this file explains the architecture choice; the registry and ranking docs should define the actual rules.
  • Config Implementation Note - sketches the concrete first config extraction and the later phases after that.
  • Pipeline Target Architecture - sketches the long-term ownership boundary where search owns its own pipeline and consumes canonical outputs from other systems.
  • Studio V1 Index Shape - defines the proposed scope=studio record shape and explains how Studio v1 fits the wider plan.
  • Change Log Guidance
  • Change Log
